title: Funsies
description: A Create based modpack thats made for goofies
body:
**

Funsies

** A goofy 1.21.1 Create Modpack filled with a bunch of Create addons and other fun mods made for a more relaxed and enjoyable time with Create :P Explore the world and find many create structures and build your own factory to produce whatever it is you might need!
generally this is a small create modpack that im making on the side, if u have any suggestions or want to be kept updated u are most welcome to join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/sznMgQGd4e).
